message.content:
The exact OpenRouter model string for **Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview)** is:  
`google/gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview`.[3][6]

As of the latest available OpenRouter status and documentation, there are **no reported platform-wide outages specifically affecting Google models**, and Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview) is listed as an active image model rather than degraded or unavailable.[3][6]
